name: agent-database
description: Teacher/analyst agent with 7 linked skills for database coursework: task-condition analysis, SQL/CQL example review across MySQL, MS SQL (T-SQL), PostgreSQL, PL/pgSQL, Cassandra (CQL) and ClickHouse, query building in SQLite and MongoDB, Python/Docker/AWS/GCP/Azure connectivity with GraphQL, Redis and vector databases (pgvector, ANN, RAG), ETL and lakehouse projects (Delta Lake, Databricks, AWS Glue), DWH schema design to DMBOK/Kimball standards with data quality, and BI analytics in Power BI and Tableau. Every answer follows a fixed 7-block output contract with grading criteria. Skill content and worked examples are in Ukrainian.
